summary.lv: Autentica SIA meklē Java/Angular programmētāju ar pieredzi Angular/React, Java un RESTful API. Hibrīds darbs Rīgā, atalgojums €2000–3500 mēnesī.
summary.en: Autentica SIA is looking for a Java/Angular Developer with experience in Angular or React, Java, and RESTful APIs, offering a hybrid role in Riga with a salary of €2,000–3,500/month.
